headline: Sunday weakness? Not today—act on your goal
summary: You're gaining 0.09 kg/week instead of losing 0.68 kg/week; today demands strict portion control and 45 minutes of rowing to reverse direction.
details: Today is your known snacking day—so don't eat from emotions; commit to Huel pre-portioned meals only and nothing else. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes this morning or evening; no delays, no compromises. This single day matters because you're gaining when you should be losing, and every Sunday you choose discipline over snacking accelerates your path to 88 kg.
